What We Offer

Our Services

Start a Project
01 🎬

Video Editing

Professional post-production with cinematic colour grading, sound design, and seamless transitions.

02 💍

Wedding Films

Timeless cinematic wedding films from traditional documentaries to full feature-length productions.

03 📱

Reels & Content

Scroll-stopping Instagram reels optimised for engagement, reach, and brand storytelling.

04 🏢

Commercial Shoots

High-impact ad films and brand content that drive results and elevate your business presence.

05 ✉️

Invitation Videos

Elegant digital invitations for weddings, events, and special occasions. WhatsApp-ready formats.

The Person Behind the Lens

Passion Meets Craft

I'm Subham Prusty — a video editor and studio owner based in Hinjilicut, Odisha, driven by a singular obsession: turning raw footage into unforgettable cinematic experiences.

With 5+ years of hands-on craft, I've worked on 200+ projects — from intimate wedding films that make families cry happy tears, to high-energy commercial reels that stop the scroll. Every project gets my full attention, creative energy, and technical precision.

"Subham turned our wedding footage into an absolute masterpiece. Every frame tells our love story. We've watched it a hundred times and still cry tears of joy every single time."
